title: A Charm, Or An Allay For Love.
content:
If so be a toad be laid
    In a sheep's-skin newly flay'd,
    And that tied to man, 'twill sever
    Him and his affections ever.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Robert Herrick delivers a powerful performance in "A Charm, Or An Allay For Love."...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
